V003-N00286.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00286.definition: Characterized by pain in the hands/feet with a dark purple colour and cold sensation, the pain alleviates with warmth and aggravates with cold. Alternatively, lower abdominal pain, cold limbs and delayed period with a dark purple menstrual colour and clots may be present. The tongue is pale dark with a white coating. The pulse is deep, slow and hesitant. Often occurs when cold causes the qi and blood to stagnate.

V003-N00287.label: 血虚寒凝证
V003-N00287.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血寒证

V003-N00287.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00287.label: 血虚寒凝证
V003-N00287.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00287.definition: Characterized by a pale dark complexion, dizziness, blurred vision, dark purple lips and tongue, cold hands/feet, and localized coldness, pain and numbness. Alternatively, delayed period, scanty menstrual volume in purple colour, clots, dysmenorrhea or amenorrhoea may be present. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is deep, thready and hesitant. Often results from blood deficiency coupled with cold retention.

V003-N00287.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00287.definition: 血液亏虚，寒邪凝滞，血行不畅，以面色淡暗，头晕眼花，唇舌紫暗，手足不温，局部冷痛麻木，妇女月经后期、量少色紫、经血夹块，痛经闭经，苔白脉沉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00287.label: 血虚寒凝证
V003-N00287.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00287.definition: 血虚而又有寒邪凝滞，血行不畅，以面色淡晴，头晕眼花，唇舌紫暗，手足不温，局部冷痛麻木，或妇女月经后期、量少色紫、经血夹块、经痛经闭，苔白脉沉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00290.label: 血热伤阴证
V003-N00290.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜血分证
V003-N00290.definition: 温热病邪深入血分，耗伤阴液，以身热面红，口舌干燥，耳鸣耳聋，神疲不寐，五心烦热，脉数无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00291.label: 血热化燥证
V003-N00291.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热兼夹证｜血热伤阴证

V003-N00291.label: 血热化燥证
V003-N00291.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜血分证
V003-N00291.definition: 热邪深入血分，伤阴化燥，以咽干口燥，大便干结，形瘦神疲，身热夜甚，渴不多饮，舌绛少苔少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00292.label: 血热耗阴证
V003-N00292.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热兼夹证｜血热伤阴证

V003-N00294.label: 血热挟湿证
V003-N00294.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热兼夹证｜血热夹邪证

V003-N00294.label: 血热挟湿证
V003-N00294.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜血分证
V003-N00294.definition: 热邪深入血分，兼挟湿浊，以身热夜甚，渴不多饮，神识不清，头胀身重，斑疹显露，胸脘痞闷，舌绛苔黄腻，脉濡数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00295.label: 血热瘀滞证
V003-N00295.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热兼夹证｜血热夹邪证

V003-N00295.label: 血热瘀滞证
V003-N00295.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜血分证
V003-N00295.definition: 热邪深入血分，气滞血瘀，以身热夜甚，烦躁不宁，渴欲漱水不欲咽，斑疹紫暗，舌绛紫而干，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00296.label: 血热风燥证
V003-N00296.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热兼夹证｜血热夹邪证

V003-N00297.label: 血热风盛证
V003-N00297.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热兼夹证｜血热夹邪证

V003-N00297.label: 血热风盛证
V003-N00297.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜血分证
V003-N00297.definition: 温热病邪深入血分，邪热内盛，热极动风，以壮热肢厥，口渴饮冷，四肢抽搐，两目上视，角弓反张，舌质红绛，苔黄而燥，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00298.label: 血热内盛证
V003-N00298.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证

V003-N00299.label: 血热伤络证
V003-N00299.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证

V003-N00299.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N00299.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类｜瘀血兼夹证｜瘀热证

V003-N00299.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00299.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N00299.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类｜瘀血兼夹证｜瘀热证
V003-N00299.definition: 因邪热与瘀血互结，或热蕴于脉络所致。临床以患处红肿、灼痛，或鲜红、紫黯色斑块，舌质绛或紫，脉细涩数，伴见低热或夜热早凉，渴不欲饮等为特征的证候。

V003-N00299.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00299.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N00299.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00299.definition: Characterized by a low-grade fever and redness of the affected area with a burning pain. The tongue is deep red or purple. The pulse is thready, hesitant and rapid. This pattern often occurs when intertwined heat and stagnant blood obstruct the meridians.

V003-N00299.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N00299.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N00299.definition: 邪热与瘀血阻结于脉络，以低热，患处灼热疼痛、色赤，舌绛或紫，脉细涩数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01069.label: 血热伤络证
V003-N01069.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证

V003-N01069.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N01069.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类｜瘀血兼夹证｜瘀热证

V003-N01069.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01069.label: 血热伤络证
V003-N01069.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证
V003-N01069.definition: 因血热内盛，或阴虚火旺，灼损血络，血渗溢于肤腠所致。临床以皮肤骤见鲜红或青紫斑块、斑点，或牙龈红肿、疼痛、溃烂、出血，舌质红，舌苔黄或少苔，脉数或弦数有力，可伴见潮热，面红，目赤肿痛，鼻衄，腹痛，月经过多等为特征的证候。

V003-N01069.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01069.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N01069.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01069.definition: Characterized by a low-grade fever and redness of the affected area with a burning pain. The tongue is deep red or purple. The pulse is thready, hesitant and rapid. This pattern often occurs when intertwined heat and stagnant blood obstruct the meridians.

V003-N01069.label: 瘀热入络证
V003-N01069.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N01069.definition: 邪热与瘀血阻结于脉络，以低热，患处灼热疼痛、色赤，舌绛或紫，脉细涩数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00300.label: 血热内陷证
V003-N00300.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证

V003-N00301.label: 血热壅滞证
V003-N00301.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证

V003-N00302.label: 血热壅滞胞睑证
V003-N00302.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证｜血热壅滞证

V003-N00304.label: 血热扰神证
V003-N00304.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证

V003-N00304.label: 血热扰神证
V003-N00304.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜血分证
V003-N00304.definition: 血分热盛，扰乱神明，以心悸心烦，躁扰不宁，或有谵语，身热夜甚，渴不多饮，斑疹显露，舌色深绛、少津少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00305.label: 血燥证
V003-N00305.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V003-N00305.label: 血燥证
V003-N00305.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜气血津液证｜血证

V003-N00305.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00305.label: 血燥证
V003-N00305.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00305.definition: Characterized by flaking of grey-white dandruff and dry scalp. Often results from blood/fluid deficiency, spleen deficiency or heat-damaging yin.

V003-N00306.label: 血燥失养证
V003-N00306.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血燥证

V003-N00306.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00306.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00306.definition: 血虚风胜化燥，皮毛、筋脉失养，以皮肤粗糙、干燥脱屑、瘙痒，或枯皱皲裂，毛发失荣脱落，肌肤麻木，手足拘急，面白无华，爪甲淡白，头晕眼花，舌淡脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00307.label: 血燥生风证

V003-N01077.definition: 因瘀血内结，气机郁滞所致。临床以腹胀，腹内癥块隐痛，或刺痛、拒按，或局部肿痛、青紫，舌质紫或有瘀点，脉弦细等为特征的证候。

V003-N00316.label: 血瘀动血证
V003-N00316.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00316.label: 血瘀动血证
V003-N00316.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00316.definition: Characterized by bleeding of dark purple blood with clots, localized stabbing pain with a fixed position or bluish lumps. The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood causes the blood to flow out of the vessels.

V003-N00316.label: 血瘀动血证
V003-N00316.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N00316.definition: 瘀血阻塞，血溢脉外，以出血色紫暗、夹块，或局部刺痛、固定，或见青紫肿块，舌紫或有斑点，脉涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00317.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N00317.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00317.label: 瘀滞化热证
V003-N00317.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类｜瘀血兼夹证｜瘀热证

V003-N00317.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00317.label: 瘀滞化热证
V003-N00317.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类｜瘀血兼夹证｜瘀热证
V003-N00317.definition: 因瘀血凝滞，壅阻气血化热所致。临床以右下腹疼痛、拒按，腹皮板滞，压痛、反跳痛明显，或可触及包块，或产后小腹胀急、疼痛，小便不通或短涩，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦滑数，可伴见发热，口渴或口干、不欲饮，大便秘结等为特征的证候。

V003-N00317.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00317.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N00317.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00317.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain with a burning sensation, bluish lumps, afternoon or night fever, and a dry mouth with no desire to drink water. The tongue is dark red or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant and rapid. Often occurs when prolonged blood stasis transforms into heat.

V003-N00317.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N00317.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N00317.definition: 血瘀日久化热，以局部刺痛、灼热，或有青紫肿块，午后或夜间发热，口干漱水不欲咽，舌暗红或有斑点，脉涩而数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01065.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N01065.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N01065.label: 瘀滞化热证
V003-N01065.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类｜瘀血兼夹证｜瘀热证

V003-N01065.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01065.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N01065.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证
V003-N01065.definition: 因血瘀内结，壅滞化热所致。临床以局部固定刺痛、灼痛感，或有青紫肿块，午后或夜间发热，或自觉患处发热，口干、不欲饮，舌质暗红，或有瘀点、瘀斑，脉涩而数等为特征的证候。

V003-N01065.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01065.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N01065.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01065.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain with a burning sensation, bluish lumps, afternoon or night fever, and a dry mouth with no desire to drink water. The tongue is dark red or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant and rapid. Often occurs when prolonged blood stasis transforms into heat.

V003-N01065.label: 血瘀化热证
V003-N01065.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N01065.definition: 血瘀日久化热，以局部刺痛、灼热，或有青紫肿块，午后或夜间发热，口干漱水不欲咽，舌暗红或有斑点，脉涩而数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00318.label: 血瘀成痈证
V003-N00318.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00319.label: 血瘀水停证
V003-N00319.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00319.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00319.label: 血瘀水停证
V003-N00319.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00319.definition: Characterized by abdominal masses with a stabbing pain, abdominal bulging, inhibited urination, amenorrhoea or oedema. Alternatively, bluish, diffuse swelling and distending pain may be present. The tongue is pale purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood causes water retention.

V003-N00319.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00319.label: 血瘀水停证
V003-N00319.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00319.label: 血瘀水停证
V003-N00319.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜水液停聚证
V003-N00319.definition: 瘀血内阻，水液停聚，以腹内有癥块、刺痛，腹大而胀，小便不利，或局部青紫、漫肿刺痛，舌淡紫或有斑点，脉涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00319.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00319.label: 血瘀水停证
V003-N00319.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜病因辨证类
V003-N00319.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by formation of mass in the abdomen with stabbing pain, enlarged and distended abdomen, inhibited urination, purplish tongue or appearance of purple spots on the tongue, and fine choppy pulse

V003-N00320.label: 血瘀痰滞证
V003-N00320.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00320.label: 痰瘀互结证

V003-N00320.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00320.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N00320.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰瘀证｜痰瘀搏结证
V003-N00320.definition: 因痰瘀搏结，脉络痹阻所致。临床以局部肿块、包块刺痛，或肢体麻木、痿废，颜面胸背等处泛发黑白粉刺，舌质暗红或紫，或有瘀点、瘀斑，舌苔腻，脉弦滑或涩，可伴见胸膈或乳房疼痛，咳唾痰血，腹胀，经行腹痛，经血色紫黑，婚久不孕等为特征的证候。

V003-N00320.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00320.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N00320.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00320.definition: Characterized by local lumps with stabbing pain, limb numbness or flaccidity, chest tightness, and profuse phlegm that may contain dark purple clots. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis and a greasy coating. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when turbid phlegm intertwines with stagnant blood.

V003-N00320.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N00320.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证
V003-N00320.definition: 痰浊瘀血相互搏结，以局部肿块刺痛，或肢体麻木、痿废，胸闷痰多，或痰中带紫暗血块，舌紫暗或有斑点，苔腻，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01028.label: 血瘀痰滞证
V003-N01028.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N01028.label: 痰瘀搏结证

V003-N01028.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01028.label: 血瘀痰滞证
V003-N01028.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证
V003-N01028.definition: 因肝脾郁结，或冲任失调，血瘀痰凝互结所致。临床以局部触及较大肿块，质地圆滑，推之可移，或坚实木硬，重坠不适，舌质暗红，舌苔薄腻，脉弦滑或涩，可伴见胸胁牵痛，烦闷急躁，月经不调，痛经等为特征的证候。

V003-N01028.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01028.label: 痰瘀搏结证

V003-N01028.definition: 泛指因痰瘀互结，痹阻经络、脏腑、官窍等部位所引起的一类证候。

V003-N01028.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V003-N01028.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01028.definition: Characterized by local lumps with stabbing pain, limb numbness or flaccidity, chest tightness, and profuse phlegm that may contain dark purple clots. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis and a greasy coating. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when turbid phlegm intertwines with stagnant blood.

V003-N01028.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N01028.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N01028.definition: 痰浊与瘀血相互搏结，以局部肿块刺痛，或肢体麻木、痿废，胸闷多痰，或痰中带紫暗血块，舌紫暗或有斑点，苔腻，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01028.label: 痰瘀互结证
V003-N01028.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证
V003-N01028.definition: 痰浊瘀血相互搏结，以局部肿块刺痛，或肢体麻木、痿废，胸闷痰多，或痰中带紫暗血块，舌紫暗或有斑点，苔腻，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00321.label: 血瘀肉腐证
V003-N00321.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00322.label: 血瘀风燥证

V003-N00322.label: 血瘀风燥证

V003-N00322.definition: 瘀血内阻，新血不生，化燥生风，以肌肤甲错，皮肤干涩脱屑、瘙痒，或眩晕，肢体麻木，舌紫暗或有斑点，脉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00322.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00322.label: 血瘀风燥证
V003-N00322.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜病因辨证类
V003-N00322.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when internally retained static blood gives rise to dryness and wind, and manifested by encrusted skin, desquamation and itching, associated with vertigo, numbness of the limb, purplish tongue or appearance of purple spots o

V003-N00323.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证｜血瘀兼夹证

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜气血津液证｜血证

V003-N00324.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00324.definition: Characterized by a pale or sallow complexion, pale lips, tongue and fingernails, dizziness, blurred vision, palpitations, dream-disturbed sleep, hands/feet numbness, scanty menstruation with a pale menstrual colour, and delayed period or amenorrhea. The pulse is thready. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the zang–fu organs, meridians and other body tissues.

V003-N00324.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00324.label: 血虚证

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00324.definition: 血液亏虚，失于荣养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇、甲淡白，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女经少经闭，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V003-N00324.definition: 血液亏虚，脏腑、经络、形体失养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇舌爪甲色淡，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女月经量少、色淡、衍期或经闭，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00324.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00324.label: 血虚证
V003-N00324.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00324.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale or sallow complexion, pale lips and nails, dizziness, dimmed vision, palpitations, numbness of extremities and fine pulse

V003-N00325.label: 亡血证
V003-N00325.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证

V003-N00325.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00325.definition: Characterized by a pale face, dizziness, blurred vision, mild to severe palpitations, shortness of breath, and cold limbs. The tongue is pale. The pulse feels like a scallion stalk. Often results from sudden or chronic blood loss.

V003-N00325.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00325.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，致血脉空虚，脏腑组织失养，以面色苍白，头晕目眩，心悸怔忡，气微而短，四肢厥冷，渐致神志昏蒙，舌淡白，脉芤，或微细欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V003-N00325.definition: 突然大量出血或长期反复出血,血液亡脱于外,以面色苍白,头晕眼花,心悸怔忡,气微而短,四肢清冷,舌淡脉芤等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00325.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00325.label: 血脱证
V003-N00325.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00325.definition: a critical pattern/syndrome occurring in cases of acute massive bleeding, marked by pallor, dizziness, palpitations, faint and short breathing, cold extremities and even mental confusion, pale tongue, hollow pulse or hardly perceptible pulse

V003-N00331.definition: Characterized by a lustreless complexion and fever. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. Often results from blood deficiency generating internal heat.

V003-N00331.definition: 血虚而气无依附，浮动而发热，以面目无华，舌淡脉细，而又有发热为主要表现的证候。

V003-N00337.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00337.label: 血虚毒恋证
V003-N00337.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证｜血虚邪恋证
V003-N00337.definition: 因血虚亏损，邪毒留恋不去所致。临床以面、睑、唇、舌、甲色淡，头晕、眼花，脉细等血虚征象外，伴见温毒或热毒、湿毒、虫毒等病邪留滞相应征象为特征的证候。

V003-N00337.label: 血虚邪恋证
V003-N00337.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00337.definition: 泛指血液亏虚而又有邪毒留滞所反映的证候。除有面、睑、唇、舌、甲色淡，肢体麻木，脉细等血虚见症外，由于邪毒性质不同而有各自的特征。

V003-N00338.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00338.label: 血虚邪恋证
V003-N00338.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证
V003-N00338.definition: 因血亏虚损，余邪留恋不去所致。临床以面、睑、唇、舌、甲色淡，头晕、眼花，肢体麻木，脉细等血虚征象外，伴见风或寒、暑、湿、燥、热、温毒等病邪留滞相应征象为特征的证候。

V003-N00338.label: 血虚邪恋证

V003-N00338.definition: 泛指血液亏虚而又有邪毒留滞所反映的证候。除有面、睑、唇、舌、甲色淡，肢体麻木，脉细等血虚见症外，由于邪毒性质不同而有各自的特征。

V003-N00340.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证｜血虚风盛证

V003-N00340.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00340.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00340.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证｜血虚风盛证
V003-N00340.definition: 因血虚生风化燥，皮毛、筋脉失养所致。临床以皮肤粗糙，干燥脱屑，瘙痒，或枯皱皲裂，毛发干枯脱落，肌肤麻木，手足拘急，舌质淡，脉细，伴见面白无华，爪甲淡白，头晕眼花等为特征的证候。

V003-N00340.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00340.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00340.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00340.definition: Characterized by dry, rough, itchy and scaly skin, malnourishment and loss of hair, skin numbness, contraction of the hands/feet, a pale, lustreless complexion, pale white fingernails, dizziness, and blurred vision. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the skin, tendons and muscles.

V003-N00340.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00340.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00340.definition: 血虚风胜化燥，皮毛、筋脉失养，以皮肤粗糙、干燥脱屑、瘙痒，或枯皱皲裂，毛发失荣脱落，肌肤麻木，手足拘急，面白无华，爪甲淡白，头晕眼花，舌淡脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00342.label: 血虚风盛证
V003-N00342.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证

V003-N00342.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00342.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证｜血虚风盛证

V003-N00342.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00342.label: 血虚风盛证
V003-N00342.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证
V003-N00342.definition: 因血虚亏损，风从内生，或外感风邪所致。临床以头晕、眼花，皮肤干燥、瘙痒，肢体麻木或颤动，舌质淡，脉细，伴见面白无华，爪甲淡白等为特征的证候。

V003-N00342.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00342.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00342.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00342.definition: Characterized by dry, rough, itchy and scaly skin, malnourishment and loss of hair, skin numbness, contraction of the hands/feet, a pale, lustreless complexion, pale white fingernails, dizziness, and blurred vision. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the skin, tendons and muscles.

V003-N00342.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00342.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00342.definition: 血虚失荣，化燥生风，以皮肤粗糙干燥，脱屑瘙痒，或枯皱皲裂，毛发干枯脱落，肌肤麻木，手足拘急，面白无华，爪甲淡白，头晕眼花，舌淡脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00342.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00342.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00342.definition: 血虚风胜化燥，皮毛、筋脉失养，以皮肤粗糙、干燥脱屑、瘙痒，或枯皱皲裂，毛发失荣脱落，肌肤麻木，手足拘急，面白无华，爪甲淡白，头晕眼花，舌淡脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00342.label: 血虚风燥证
V003-N00342.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00342.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry, rough, itchy, shriveled skin with rhagades, withering and loss of hair, numbness of body surface, contraction of hands and feet, lusterless complexion, pale nails, dizziness and blurred vision, pale tongue and fine pu

V003-N00341.label: 血虚动风证
V003-N00341.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证｜血虚风盛证

V003-N00341.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00341.label: 血虚动风证
V003-N00341.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00341.definition: Characterized by a lustreless complexion, dry fingernails, dream-disturbed sleep, blurred vision, limb numbness, and skin itching. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the body and causes stirring of internal wind.

V003-N00341.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00341.label: 血虚生风证
V003-N00341.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00341.label: 血虚动风证
V003-N00341.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00341.definition: 血液亏虚，形体失养，虚风内动，以面白无华，爪甲不荣，夜寐多梦，视物模糊，头晕眼花，肢体麻木，皮肤瘙痒等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00341.label: 血虚动风证
V003-N00341.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00341.definition: 血液亏虚，形体失养，虚风内动，以面白无华，爪甲不荣，夜寐多梦，视物模糊，头晕眼花，肢体麻木，皮肤瘙痒等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00341.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00341.label: 血虚生风证
V003-N00341.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V003-N00341.definition: a liver wind pattern/syndrome attributed to blood deficiency that deprives the sinews of nourishment, and marked by numbness, tremor, contraction of limbs, itching, vertigo, lusterless nails, pale tongue and fine weak pulse

V003-N00343.label: 血虚风袭证
V003-N00343.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚兼夹证｜血虚风盛证

V003-N00343.label: 血虚风袭证
V003-N00343.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00343.definition: 素体血虚，复受风袭，以面白无华，唇甲淡白，皮肤干燥、瘙痒、脱屑，颜面麻木不仁，口眼喎斜，舌淡脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00344.label: 血虚失养证
V003-N00344.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证

V003-N00345.label: 血不养心证
V003-N00345.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00346.label: 血不养肝证
V003-N00346.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00347.label: 血不润肤证
V003-N00347.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00348.label: 血不荣筋证
V003-N00348.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00349.label: 血虚唇燥证
V003-N00349.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00349.label: 血虚唇燥证
V003-N00349.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜头面官窍证候｜口唇证
V003-N00349.definition: 血液亏虚，口唇失养，以口唇肌膜干燥少津、皲裂、瘙痒、脱屑，或口唇粘膜有黄白色小溃疡，反复发作，唇舌淡白，面色萎黄，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00350.label: 血虚络损证
V003-N00350.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00351.label: 血虚耳燥证
V003-N00351.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00351.label: 血虚耳燥证
V003-N00351.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜头面官窍证候｜耳窍证
V003-N00351.definition: 血虚风燥，耳廓肌肤失养，以耳道、耳廓及其周围皮肤增厚、粗糙、皲裂、脱屑，面色萎黄，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00352.label: 血虚耳窍失养证
V003-N00352.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00352.label: 血虚耳窍失养证
V003-N00352.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜头面官窍证候｜耳窍证
V003-N00352.definition: 血液亏少，耳窍失养，以听力渐减，听音不真，心悸耳鸣，头晕目眩，失眠多梦，面白，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00353.label: 血虚肠燥证
V003-N00353.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00353.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00353.label: 血虚肠燥证
V003-N00353.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00353.definition: Characterized by difficulty passing of dry stools, one bowel movement in several days, and a pale face. Bloody stools may also be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when blood fails to nourish the large intestine.

V003-N00353.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00353.label: 血虚肠燥证
V003-N00353.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00353.label: 血虚肠燥证
V003-N00353.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00353.definition: 血液亏虚，肠失濡润，以大便于结，艰涩难下，多日一便，或有便血，面白头晕，舌淡，脉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00353.label: 血虚肠燥证
V003-N00353.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V003-N00353.definition: 血液亏虚，肠失濡润，以大便干结、艰涩难下，多日一便，或有便血，面白，舌淡，脉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00353.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00353.label: 血虚肠燥证
V003-N00353.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜脏腑辨证类
V003-N00353.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by deficiency of blood depriving the intestines of moisture, and marked by dry stool difficult to defecate or accompanied by hematochezia, pale complexion and tongue, and fine choppy pulse

V003-N00354.label: 血虚鼻窍失养证
V003-N00354.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚失养证

V003-N00354.label: 血虚鼻窍失养证
V003-N00354.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜头面官窍证候｜鼻窍证
V003-N00354.definition: 血虚不能上荣于鼻，鼻窍失养，以鼻干，嗅觉减退，鼻内粘膜萎缩、鼻甲缩小、鼻腔宽大，面色无华，头晕目眩，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00355.label: 血虚阴亏证
V003-N00355.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证

V003-N00356.label: 营血虚证
V003-N00356.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚阴亏证

V003-N00357.label: 血虚津亏证
V003-N00357.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚阴亏证

V003-N00357.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00357.label: 血虚津亏证
V003-N00357.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00357.definition: Characterized by a pale, lustreless complexion, withered skin, pale white lips and fingernails, dry nose, throat and eyes, scanty urination and constipation. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and hesitant. Often occurs when blood and body fluids fail to nourish and moisten the body.

V003-N00357.label: 血虚津亏证
V003-N00357.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00357.definition: 津血亏虚，形体失其儒养，以面白无华，皮肤枯稿，唇甲淡白，鼻燥咽干，目涩少泪，小便短少，大便于结，舌红少津，脉细而涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00357.label: 血虚津亏证
V003-N00357.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证
V003-N00357.definition: 津血亏虚,形体失其濡养,以面白无华,皮肤枯槁,唇甲淡白,鼻燥咽干,目涩少泪,小便短少,大便干结,舌红少津,脉细而涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00358.label: 阴血亏虚证
V003-N00358.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚阴亏证

V003-N00358.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00358.label: 阴血亏虚证
V003-N00358.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00358.label: 阴血亏虚证
V003-N00358.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00358.definition: 阴液精血亏虚，形体失养，以形体消瘦，面色萎黄，低热颧红，肢体麻木，头晕目眩，心悸失眠，舌红苔少，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00358.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00358.label: 阴血亏虚证
V003-N00358.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00358.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by emaciation, sallow complexion, low fever, flushed cheeks, numb limbs, dizziness, blurred vision, palpitations, insomnia, reddened tongue with scanty coating and rapid fine pulse

V003-N00359.label: 阴血不足证
V003-N00359.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚阴亏证｜阴血亏虚证

V003-N00360.label: 阴血虚衰证
V003-N00360.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血虚证｜血虚阴亏证｜阴血亏虚证

V003-N00362.label: 阳实证
V003-N00362.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类

V003-N00363.label: 阳毒证
V003-N00363.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳实证

V003-N00376.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00376.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类

V003-N00376.label: 阳虚内寒证
V003-N00376.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证

V003-N00376.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00376.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00376.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类
V003-N00376.definition: 泛指因各种原因致使阳气亏损，脏腑机能衰退，或阳不制阴，甚或亡阳等引起的一类证候。

V003-N00376.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00376.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00376.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00376.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lassitude, fatigue, shortness of breath, tastelessness, absence of thirst or preference for hot water, clear urine, and loose stools. Alternatively, scanty urine, oedema and a pale face may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. Often occurs when yang qi fails to warm and nourish the zang–fu organs.

V003-N00376.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00376.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V003-N00376.definition: 阳气亏损，失却温煦推动，脏腑机能衰退，以畏寒肢冷，神疲乏力，气短，口淡不渴，或喜热饮，尿清便溏，或尿少浮肿，面白，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00369.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00369.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类

V003-N00369.label: 阳气亏虚证
V003-N00369.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证

V003-N00369.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00369.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00369.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类
V003-N00369.definition: 泛指因各种原因致使阳气亏损，脏腑机能衰退，或阳不制阴，甚或亡阳等引起的一类证候。

V003-N00369.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00369.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00369.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00369.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lassitude, fatigue, shortness of breath, tastelessness, absence of thirst or preference for hot water, clear urine, and loose stools. Alternatively, scanty urine, oedema and a pale face may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. Often occurs when yang qi fails to warm and nourish the zang–fu organs.

V003-N00369.label: 阳虚证
V003-N00369.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V003-N00369.definition: 阳气亏损，失却温煦推动，脏腑机能衰退，以畏寒肢冷，神疲乏力，气短，口淡不渴，或喜热饮，尿清便溏，或尿少浮肿，面白，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00365.label: 虚阳外越证
V003-N00365.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证

V003-N00365.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00365.label: 虚阳外越证
V003-N00365.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00365.definition: Characterized by toothache, mouth ulceration, insomnia, dizziness, hot flushes, feverish sensations in the palms and soles, red, swollen lips, profuse, clear urine, and loose or dry stools. Often occurs when internal cold retention (due to kidney yang deficiency) causes the deficiency yang qi to float outward.

V003-N00366.label: 亡阳证
V003-N00366.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜虚阳外越证

V003-N00366.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00366.label: 亡阳证
V003-N00366.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00366.definition: Characterized by cold sweats, cold body/limbs, lassitude, faint breathing, and a pale complexion. The tongue is pale with a moist coating. The pulse is extremely feeble. Often results from yang qi exhaustion or collapse.

V003-N00366.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00366.label: 亡阳证
V003-N00366.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00366.label: 亡阳证
V003-N00366.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00366.definition: 阳气衰竭而欲脱，以冷汗淋漓，身凉肢厥，神情淡漠，呼吸气微，面色苍白，舌淡苔润，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00366.label: 阳气暴脱证
V003-N00366.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00366.definition: 阳气脱失，急骤发生，以冷汗淋漓，口开目合，神昏遗尿，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00366.label: 亡阳证
V003-N00366.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V003-N00366.definition: 阳气衰竭而欲脱，以冷汗淋漓，身凉肢厥，神倦息微，面色苍白，脉微欲绝，舌淡苔润等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00366.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00366.label: 亡阳证
V003-N00366.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00366.definition: a serious pattern/syndrome resulting from exhaustion of yang qi, manifested by pallor, dripping of cold sweats, cold limbs, pale and moistened tongue, and hardly perceptible pulse

V003-N00367.label: 元阳欲脱证
V003-N00367.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜虚阳外越证

V003-N00368.label: 戴阳证
V003-N00368.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜虚阳外越证

V003-N00368.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00368.label: 戴阳证
V003-N00368.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V003-N00368.definition: A pale facial complexion with migratory reddening of the cheeks like wearing blush. It is a critical sign indicating yin rejecting yang due to yang qi failure.

V003-N00368.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00368.label: 戴阳证
V003-N00368.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病机

V003-N00368.label: 真寒假热证
V003-N00368.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00368.definition: 阴寒内盛，格阳于外，以烦热口干，面红如妆，躁扰不宁，而兼胸腹不温，下肢厥冷，小便清长，大便清冷，舌淡苔白，脉沉弦，或浮大无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00368.label: 真寒假热证
V003-N00368.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V003-N00368.definition: 泛指阴寒内盛，格阳于外，以既有手足厥冷，小便清长，大便清冷，舌淡苔白等真寒症状，又有身热反欲衣被，面色浮红，口渴欲热饮等假热表现的证候。

V003-N00368.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00368.label: 戴阳证
V003-N00368.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00368.definition: a critical pattern/syndrome of true lower body cold and false upper body heat characterized by pale complexion with tidal reddening of the cheeks

V003-N00370.label: 元阳亏虚证
V003-N00370.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证

V003-N00370.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N00370.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V003-N00370.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00370.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N00370.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V003-N00370.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或外感、内伤致使肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦所致。临床以神疲、欲寐，畏寒、肢冷，腰膝以下尤甚，面色？白或黧黑，小便清长，夜尿频数，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉沉弱，尺部无力，或伴见性欲衰减，阳痿、早泄，小便白浊，心悸、喘促，浮肿，五更泄泻，白带清稀量多，小腹或阴部有冷感，崩漏不止等为特征的证候。

V003-N00370.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N00370.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜肾病证类

V003-N00370.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00370.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N00370.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00370.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs (especially below the lower back and knee joints), a bright, pale or dark complexion, profuse, clear urine and frequent urination at night. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when kidney yang fails to warm the body.

V003-N01743.label: 元阳亏虚证
V003-N01743.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证

V003-N01743.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N01743.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V003-N01743.label: 命门火衰证
V003-N01743.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾阳虚证

V003-N01743.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01743.label: 元阳亏虚证
V003-N01743.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证
V003-N01743.definition: 因先天禀赋虚薄，或久病、重病伤损元阳所致。临床以遗精、早泄，或精少不育，闭经、不孕，或头眩、晕仆，动辄心悸、怔忡，或五更泄泻，完谷不化，小便频数、清长，舌质淡胖，舌苔白，脉沉迟，尺部弱，伴见精神萎靡，面色？白，形寒、畏冷，四肢不温，腰膝酸软，齿浮、齿摇等为特征的证候。

V003-N01743.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01743.label: 命门火衰证
V003-N01743.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾阳虚证
V003-N01743.definition: 因禀赋虚薄，元阳虚衰，温煦推动失职所致。临床以形寒、畏冷，冷彻骨髓，神倦、蜷卧，小便清长，夜尿频多，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉弱或迟，尺部尤甚，或伴见五更泄泻，遗尿淋浊，阳痿不举，精液清冷或无精子，性欲淡漠，不孕、不育等为特征的证候。

V003-N01743.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N01743.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜肾病证类

V003-N01743.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01743.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N01743.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01743.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs (especially below the lower back and knee joints), a bright, pale or dark complexion, profuse, clear urine and frequent urination at night. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when kidney yang fails to warm the body.

V003-N01743.label: 命门火衰证
V003-N01743.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N01743.definition: 元阳虚衰，温煦推动失职，以畏寒蜷卧，四肢逆冷，小便清长，夜尿频多，或五更泄泻，男子阳痿、早泄，女子性欲减退、宫寒不孕，舌淡，苔白，脉沉弱尺部尤甚等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01743.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N01743.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N01743.definition: 肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦，以畏寒肢冷，腰以下为甚，面色(白光)白或黧黑，神疲乏力，小便清长，夜尿多，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01743.label: 肾阳虚证
V003-N01743.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证

V003-N00375.definition: 阳气亏损，失却温煦推动，脏腑机能衰退，以畏寒肢冷，神疲乏力，气短，口淡不渴，或喜热饮，尿清便溏，或尿少浮肿，面白，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00388.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒饮证
V003-N00388.definition: 因寒饮互结，内伏于肺，或滞留胸膈、胃脘，或泛溢肌腠所致。临床以咳唾痰沫，或呕吐清水、稀涎，面浮、肢肿，形寒、畏冷，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉沉弦或弦滑，可伴见咳喘，脘痞，胃胀，胸闷，胁满等为特征的证候。

V003-N00389.definition: 阳气亏损，瘀血阻滞；以畏寒肢凉，肢体麻木，或痿废不用，或局部固定刺痛，舌淡胖或有瘀点、瘀斑，脉沉迟而涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00389.label: 阳虚血瘀证
V003-N00389.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V003-N00389.definition: 阳气亏损，瘀血阻滞，以畏寒肢凉，肢体麻木，或痿废不用，或局部固定刺痛，肢体紫斑，出血紫暗夹块，舌淡胖或有斑点，脉沉迟而涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00390.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00390.label: 阳虚毒恋证
V003-N00390.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳虚兼夹证｜阳虚邪恋证
V003-N00390.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或邪毒损伤阳气、留恋不复所致。临床以低热或潮热不止，形寒、畏冷，四肢不温，神疲、乏力，大便溏薄，小便清长，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉虚数无力，伴见火毒或热毒、湿毒、虫毒等余邪未尽征象为特征的证候。

V003-N00390.label: 阳虚邪恋证
V003-N00390.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V003-N00390.definition: 泛指阳气亏虚而又有邪毒留滞所反映的证候。除有畏寒肢冷喜暖，尿清便溏，舌淡胖，苔白滑等阳虚见症外，由于留滞的邪毒性质不同而有各自的特征。

V003-N00391.label: 阳虚邪恋证

V003-N00391.label: 阳虚邪恋证
V003-N00391.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳虚兼夹证
V003-N00391.definition: 因阳气亏虚，病邪留恋不去所致。临床以形寒、畏冷，四肢不温，嗜睡、倦怠，便溏、尿清，舌质淡胖，舌苔白，脉沉无力，或伴见低热缠绵，口不渴，以及余邪或余毒未尽等相应征象为特征的证候。

V003-N00404.definition: 因外感诸邪入里化燥，或瘟热邪入阴分，失治误治，伤津耗液，或饮食、劳伤损及脏腑，阴液生成不足，髓海空虚所致。临床以形体消瘦，皮肤干瘪，眼眶凹陷，眼鼻口咽干燥，烦渴引饮，或眩晕不止，脑鸣、耳鸣，记忆力下降，关节僵硬，屈伸不利，胫酸、骨痛，耳鸣，舌体瘦小，舌苔少或无，脉细弱无力等为特征的证候。

V003-N00404.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00404.label: 阴虚证
V003-N00404.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00404.definition: Characterized by feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, bone-steaming fever, flushed cheeks, dizziness, tinnitus, dry lips, nose, throat and skin, night sweats, nocturnal emissions, and constipation. The tongue is red with a dry, scanty coating. The pulse is thready, rapid and weak. Alternatively, the tongue is deep red with a peeled coating. Often results from consumption of yin fluids and relative hyperactivity of yang qi.

V003-N00406.label: 亡阴证
V003-N00406.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V003-N00406.definition: 津液大量耗损，阴精欲竭，以身热面赤，汗出如油，烦躁不宁，口渴饮冷，目眶内陷，甚则昏迷谵语，舌干无津，脉细疾数等为常见症的危重证候。

V003-N00406.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00406.label: 亡阴证
V003-N00406.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00406.definition: a serious pattern/syndrome resulting from exhaustion of yin fluid, manifested by thirst and craving for cold drink, flushed face, restlessness, dry tongue and rapid fine pulse

V003-N00409.definition: often resulting from invasion of heat pathogen or in advanced cases of febrile disease with impairment of the liver and kidney yin, usually manifested as low fever, heat sensation in the palms and soles, emaciation, thirst, malar flush, dry and scarle

V003-N00410.label: 疹后阴伤证
V003-N00410.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴液亏虚证｜阴伤证

V003-N00413.label: 阴津亏虚证
V003-N00413.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴液亏虚证

V003-N00413.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00413.label: 阴虚津亏证
V003-N00413.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00413.definition: Characterized by a dry mouth, throat and skin, sunken eyes, scanty, yellow urine, constipation, weight loss, and night sweats. The tongue is red with a dry, scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often occurs when yin fluids fail to nourish the body.

V003-N00413.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00413.label: 阴虚津亏证
V003-N00413.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00413.label: 阴虚津亏证
V003-N00413.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00413.definition: 阴津亏虚，形体失养，以口渴引饮，皮肤干涩，眼眶凹陷，小便短黄，大便干结，五心烦热，形瘦盗汗，舌红苔少而干，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00413.label: 阴津亏虚证
V003-N00413.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00413.definition: 阴津亏耗，形体失养，以口渴引饮，皮肤干涩，眼眶凹陷，小便短黄，大便干结，五心烦热，形瘦盗汗，舌红苔少而干，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00413.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00413.label: 阴虚津亏证
V003-N00413.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00413.definition: a pattern/syndrome of yin fluid deficiency, manifested by dire thirst, dry skin, sunken eyes, short voidings of yellow urine, dry and bound stool, vexing heat in the chest, palms and soles, emaciation, night sweats, reddened tongue with scanty coating

V003-N00414.label: 阴液涸竭证
V003-N00414.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴液亏虚证

V003-N00415.label: 阴精亏虚证

V003-N00416.label: 真阴亏虚证
V003-N00416.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴精亏虚证

V003-N00416.label: 肾阴虚证
V003-N00416.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00416.definition: 肾阴亏损，虚热内扰，以腰膝酸软而痛，男子遗精，女子经少或经闭，齿松发脱，眩晕耳鸣，五心烦热，潮热颧红，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00417.label: 阴虚精亏证
V003-N00417.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴精亏虚证

V003-N00418.label: 阴虚兼夹证
V003-N00418.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证

V003-N00418.label: 阴虚夹实证
V003-N00418.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚实夹杂证
V003-N00418.definition: 泛指阴虚兼夹实热、水湿、痰浊、瘀血等邪的证候。其症除有阴虚表现外，并因实邪不同而各具特征。

V003-N00419.label: 阴虚动风证
V003-N00419.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴虚兼夹证

V003-N00419.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00419.label: 阴虚动风证
V003-N00419.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00419.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, limb numbness, weight loss, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, a dry mouth and throat, scanty, yellow urine and constipation. Alternatively, convulsions or tremor of the hands/feet may be present. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often occurs when deficiency of yin fluids causes malnourishment of meridians and stirring of deficiency wind.

V003-N00419.label: 阴虚动风证
V003-N00419.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00419.definition: 肝阴亏虚，筋脉失养而动风，以头晕目眩，肢体发麻，或手足蠕动、震颤，形体消瘦，五心烦热，口燥咽干，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00419.label: 阴虚动风证
V003-N00419.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00419.definition: 阴液亏虚，经脉失养，虚风内动，以头目眩晕，肢体发麻，或手足瘈疭、震颤，形体消瘦，五心烦热，口燥咽干，小便短黄，大便干结，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00419.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00419.label: 阴虚动风证
V003-N00419.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜脏腑辨证类
V003-N00419.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when deficiency of yin fluid deprives the meridians/channels of nourishment and stirs up the internal wind, marked by twitching of extremities, accompanied by dizziness, tinnitus, flushed cheeks and dry reddened tongue

V003-N00421.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00421.definition: 阴液亏虚，湿热内阻；以低热烦闷，肢体困重，口苦而腻，颧红，盗汗，小便淋涩灼痛，舌红苔黄腻，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00421.label: 阴虚湿热证
V003-N00421.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00421.definition: 阴液亏虚，湿热内阻，以低热盗汗，午后颧红，五心烦热，小便淋涩灼痛，口苦口腻，肢体困重，舌红苔黄腻，脉细滑数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00421.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00421.label: 阴虚湿热证
V003-N00421.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V003-N00421.definition: a pattern/syndrome of yin-fluid deficiency complicated with dampness-heat obstruction, manifested by low fever, night sweating, flushed cheeks in the afternoon, vexing heat in the chest, palms and soles, bitter and greasy taste in the mouth, cumbersom

V003-N00422.label: 阴虚湿阻证

V003-N00422.definition: 阴液亏虚，湿热阻滞，以低热盗汗，肢体困重，口腻食少，胸脘痞闷，舌红苔腻，脉细滑等为常见证的证候。

V003-N00423.label: 阴虚外感证

V003-N00423.definition: 阴液亏虚，又感外邪，以发热微恶寒，头身疼痛，五心烦热，脉脉浮细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00424.definition: 阴液亏虚，而热毒、火毒、水毒等毒邪壅盛，以潮热盗汗，舌红少苔，脉细数，并有邪毒内蕴症状的证候。

V003-N00431.definition: 因阴虚火旺，上攻官窍，灼损脉络所致。临床以白睛溢血，或鼻衄、齿衄、舌衄，咳唾痰血，或喉关潮红，口舌溃疡，经行口糜等，反复发作，甚则局部肿痛溃烂，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，伴见头晕、耳鸣，面部烘热，五心烦热，口干，心烦、少寐等为特征的证候。

V003-N00431.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00431.label: 阴虚火炽证
V003-N00431.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阴证类｜阴虚证｜阴虚兼夹证｜阴虚火旺证
V003-N00431.definition: 因温热邪气久羁，或肾水亏于下，心火炎于上，水亏火旺所致。临床以身热夜甚，消渴，心烦、躁扰，昏谵或不寐，舌质红绛，舌苔少或无，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V003-N00431.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00431.label: 虚火证
V003-N00431.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类
V003-N00431.definition: 泛指因秉质阴虚，或久郁化火、劳损伤阴，虚阳上浮等所引起的一类证候。

V003-N00431.definition: 阴精亏损，虚火亢旺；以骨蒸潮热，口燥咽干，烦躁失眠，盗汗，颧红，便秘尿短，舌红少津，脉细数，或遗精，或出血，或口舌生疮等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00431.label: 阴虚火旺证
V003-N00431.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V003-N00431.definition: 阴液亏虚，虚火亢旺，以心烦失眠，口燥咽干，盗汗遗精，两颧潮红，小便短黄，大便干结，或咳血、衄血，或舌体、口腔溃疡，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00888.definition: 因阴分亏损，阴虚阳亢，虚火炽盛所致。临床以骨蒸潮热，低热或烘热，烦躁、易怒、失眠，头胀、眩晕，口燥、咽痛，大便干结，小便短赤，或阳强易举，遗精，梦交，舌质红、少津，中有裂纹，舌苔少或无，脉细数，甚或伴见衄血、咳血、吐血，便血，崩漏等各种血症，血色鲜红等为特征的证候。

V003-N00435.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00435.label: 阴虚内热证
V003-N00435.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00435.definition: Characterized by a persistent low-grade fever, night sweats, flushed cheeks, a dry mouth with a desire to drink water, scanty, yellow urine and constipation. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often occurs when deficiency of yin fluids generates internal heat.

V003-N00435.label: 阴虚内热证
V003-N00435.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00435.definition: 阴液不足，虚热内生；以低热或午后潮热、手足心热、五心烦热，颧红，盗汗，口干不欲饮，便秘尿短，舌红少苔，或光红无苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00435.label: 阴虚内热证

V003-N00435.definition: 阴液亏虚，虚热内生，以低热不退，盗汗颧红，口干欲饮，小便短黄，大便干结，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00435.label: 阴虚热盛证

V003-N00449.definition: Characterized by difficulty passing of dry stools (like sheep droppings), one bowel movement in several days, and a dry mouth/nose/throat/skin. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready, rapid and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids fail to nourish the large intestine.

The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often occurs when deficiency of yin fluids generates internal heat to consume blood and bodily fluids.

V003-N00484.label: 寒湿证
V003-N00484.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00484.definition: （1）感受寒湿之邪，气血运行受阻，以关节、筋骨疼痛为常见症的证候；（2）寒湿内困而损伤脾阳，或脾肾阳虚而寒湿内停，以畏寒肢冷，腹痛泄泻，或浮肿为常见症的证候。

V003-N00484.definition: 指寒湿之邪阻滞阳气的运行，血流不畅的病证。;感受寒湿之邪，气血运行受阻，以关节、筋骨疼痛为常见的证候；寒湿内困而损伤脾阳，或脾肾阳虚而寒湿内停，以畏寒肢冷、腹痛泄泻、或浮肿为常见症的证候。

V003-N00498.definition: 因寒湿内蕴，凝聚骨节，或阴寒凝滞经脉所致。临床以关节冷痛，局部漫肿，活动受限，或行经前后或经期关节痛加重，经行小腹冷痛，得热则舒，舌苔薄白，脉弦紧或沉紧，可伴见月经后期，量少不畅，色紫黯有块，形寒、肢冷，腰膝酸痛等为特征的证候。

V003-N00498.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候

V003-N00498.definition: 因阳气虚损，阴寒凝滞于胞宫所致。临床以痛经，喜温、喜按，或月经后期，经色紫暗，或久婚不孕，或带下清稀，色白量多，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉沉紧或弦，伴见小腹冷痛、坠痛，畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the uterus.

V003-N00488.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/tightness, a greasy taste, a poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, tastelessness, abdominal pain, loose stools, and heaviness of the head and body. Dark yellow eyes/skin, profuse leucorrhoea, and obesity may also be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when internal cold dampness obstructs spleen yang.

Dark yellow eyes/skin, profuse leucorrhoea, and obesity may also be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when internal cold dampness obstructs spleen yang.

V003-N00818.label: 寒湿困脾证
V003-N00818.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V003-N00818.definition: 寒湿内盛，困阻脾阳，以脘腹胀闷，口腻纳呆，泛恶欲呕，口淡不渴，腹痛便溏，头身困重，或身目发黄而晦暗，或白带量多，体胖，舌淡胖，苔白腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00818.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V003-N00818.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric and abdominal distention, stickiness and tastelessness in the mouth, nausea, loose bowels, heaviness sensation of the head and body, or jaundice with dull yellow discoloration, pale plump tongue with white slimy

V003-N00489.label: 寒湿瘀滞证

V003-N00489.definition: 寒湿内蕴，血行瘀滞，以恶寒畏冷，肢体沉重、酸痛或刺痛，得温痛减，唇舌紫暗，舌有斑点，舌苔白滑，脉沉细涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00490.label: 寒湿外侵证
V003-N00490.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证

V003-N00492.label: 寒湿入络证

V003-N00492.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00492.label: 寒湿阻络证
V003-N00492.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿外侵证
V003-N00492.definition: 因寒湿痹阻脉络，筋骨气血失养所致。临床以肢体酸胀困重，麻木不仁，肤色苍白，触之冰凉，或患趾（指）顽麻、冷痛，疮面紫暗，疮口不收，舌苔白滑或腻，脉沉细，可伴见形寒、肢凉，皮疹暗红，关节肿胀、变形，步履不利，间歇性跛行，趺阳脉减弱或消失等为特征的证候。

V003-N00492.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00492.label: 寒湿阻络证
V003-N00492.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00492.definition: Characterized by limb or localized heaviness, coldness, pain, numbness or swelling, aversion to cold and cold limbs. The tongue coating is white and slippery. This pattern often occurs when cold damp affects the meridians.

V003-N00492.label: 寒湿阻络证
V003-N00492.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜经络证候
V003-N00492.definition: 寒湿之邪阻滞经络，以肢体或患处沉重冷痛、顽麻，或肿胀，畏冷肢凉，苔白滑等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00499.label: 寒湿入络证
V003-N00499.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿外侵证

V003-N00499.label: 寒湿阻络证

V003-N00499.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00499.label: 寒湿入络证
V003-N00499.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿外侵证
V003-N00499.definition: 因寒湿侵袭，痼结于肌腠，或阴寒凝聚，入络痹阻气血所致。临床以皮肤湿疹或结节、风团等迁延反复，局部皮损暗红或紫红，疮面瘙痒，疮口不收，或关节肿痛，晨僵，舌质淡，舌苔白或腻，脉沉缓或迟，伴见四肢不温，遇冷即作或加重，口淡、不渴等为特征的证候。

V003-N00499.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V003-N00499.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00499.definition: Characterized by limb or localized heaviness, coldness, pain, numbness or swelling, aversion to cold and cold limbs. The tongue coating is white and slippery. This pattern often occurs when cold damp affects the meridians.

V003-N00499.label: 寒湿阻络证
V003-N00499.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00499.definition: 寒湿之邪阻滞经络，以肢体或患处沉重冷痛、麻木，或肿胀，畏冷肢凉，苔白滑等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00499.label: 寒湿阻络证
V003-N00499.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜经络证候
V003-N00499.definition: 寒湿之邪阻滞经络，以肢体或患处沉重冷痛、顽麻，或肿胀，畏冷肢凉，苔白滑等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00493.label: 寒湿化热证

V003-N00494.definition: Characterized by a cold sensation and pain in the low back that worsens with cold. This pattern often occurs when cold dampness affects the lumbar region.

V003-N00494.label: 寒湿犯腰证
V003-N00494.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证｜寒湿证
V003-N00494.definition: 寒湿之邪侵及腰部，以腰脊冷痛、酸胀，遇寒痛甚为主症的证候。

V003-N00497.label: 寒湿蕴肤证
V003-N00497.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿外侵证

V003-N00497.definition: Characterized by skin numbness, stiffness, swelling, insensitivity and cold upon palpation. Often occurs when cold dampness retains in the skin.

V003-N00497.label: 寒湿蕴肤证
V003-N00497.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证｜寒湿证
V003-N00497.definition: 寒湿之邪蕴结皮肤，以皮肤麻木、僵硬、肿胀、感觉不灵，触之冷等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00500.label: 寒痰证
V003-N00500.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类

V003-N00500.definition: Characterized by coughing with white phlegm, chest tightness, gastric stuffiness, panting, wheezing sounds, cold intolerance, and cold limbs. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is wiry, slippery or wiry and tense. Often occurs when pathogenic cold binds with turbid phlegm.

V003-N00500.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00500.label: 寒痰证

V003-N00500.label: 寒痰证
V003-N00500.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00500.definition: 寒邪与痰浊凝滞，以咳吐白痰，胸闷脘痞，气喘哮鸣，恶寒肢冷，小便清，舌苔白腻，脉弦滑或弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00500.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough with whitish expectoration, dyspnea or wheezing, aversion to cold with cold limbs, white slimy tongue coating, and wiry slippery or tense pulse

V003-N00502.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V003-N00502.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜肺病证类

V003-N00502.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00502.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V003-N00502.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00502.definition: Characterized by cough, panting, phlegm sounds in the throat, chest fullness/tightness, white, sticky or thin/clear phlegm, shortness of breath upon physical exertion, an inability to lie flat, cold limbs, and cold intolerance. Fever and aversion to cold may also be present. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is tense. This pattern often occurs when retained phlegm and external cold affect the descending of lung qi.

V003-N00502.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V003-N00502.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00502.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V003-N00502.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00502.definition: 寒痰壅阻于肺，肺失宣降，以咳嗽痰多，色白易咯，胸闷，或见哮喘痰鸣，畏寒肢冷，苔白滑，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00502.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V003-N00502.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V003-N00502.definition: 寒痰停聚于肺，以恶寒畏冷，咳嗽气喘，吐白痰量多，苔白滑，脉弦紧等为常见症的证侯。

V003-N00502.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough with profuse phlegm easy to expectorate and a feeling of pressure in the chest, or phlegmatic wheezing, aversion to cold and cold limbs, pale tongue with white slimy or slippery coating, and string-like slippery puls

V003-N00503.label: 寒邪证
V003-N00503.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类

V003-N00504.label: 寒邪凝滞证
V003-N00504.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证

V003-N00504.label: 寒凝证
V003-N00504.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00504.definition: 寒邪侵袭机体，阳气被遏，以恶寒重，无汗，头身或胸腹疼痛，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00504.label: 寒凝证
V003-N00504.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V003-N00504.definition: 寒邪侵袭机体，阳气被遏，以恶寒甚，无汗，头身或胸腹疼痛，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00504.label: 里寒证
V003-N00504.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V003-N00504.definition: 寒邪直中脏腑或阳气虚衰所表现的证候。;脏腑阳气不足，阴寒内生，或寒邪直中脏腑，或寒邪由表传里，以形寒肢冷、面色苍白、口淡不渴、喜热饮、小便清长、大便溏泻、舌淡苔白润、脉沉迟等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00509.label: 寒凝气滞证
V003-N00509.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪凝滞证

V003-N00509.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00509.label: 寒凝气滞证
V003-N00509.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00509.definition: Characterized by headache, body aches, and joint pain with a cold sensation, and contracture of hands/feet. Alternatively, abdominal distension, fullness and pain with a cold sensation, vomiting of clear saliva, bowel sounds, and diarrhoea may be present. The tongue coating is white and moist. The pulse is wiry and tight. Often occurs when retained cold blocks the free flow of qi.

V003-N00505.label: 寒凝经络证
V003-N00505.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪凝滞证

V003-N00506.label: 寒凝血瘀证
V003-N00506.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪凝滞证

V003-N00506.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00506.label: 寒凝血瘀证
V003-N00506.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00506.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold pain that alleviates with warmth, bluish, cold limbs, delayed periods, and dysmenorrhea with dark, purple blood and clots. The tongue is dark purple with a white coating. The pulse is deep, slow and hesitant. Often occurs when cold blocks the circulation of blood.

V003-N00506.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00506.label: 寒凝血瘀证
V003-N00506.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00506.label: 寒凝血瘀证
V003-N00506.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V003-N00506.definition: 寒邪凝滞气机，血行瘀阻，以畏寒冷痛，得温痛减，肢冷色青，妇女月经后期、痛经、经色紫暗夹块，舌紫暗，苔白，脉沉迟而涩等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00506.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00506.label: 寒凝血瘀证
V003-N00506.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜病因辨证类
V003-N00506.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when pathogenic cold obstructs qi movement and blood flow, manifested by pain aggravated by cold and alleviated by warmth, cold and cyanotic limbs, and delayed menstruation, painful periods, menstrual discharge of dark purpl

V003-N00507.label: 寒实结胸证
V003-N00507.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪凝滞证

V003-N00507.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00507.label: 寒实结胸证
V003-N00507.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00507.definition: Characterized by pain below the heart and cold limbs. Alternatively, chest pain, abdominal distension and pain with tenderness and cough with white, thin phlegm may be present. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is deep, wiry and tight. Often occurs when pathogenic cold enters the interior or retains in the chest area due to the inappropriate use of purging therapy for Taiyang disease. It may also result from cold phlegm retention in the thoracic diaphragm.

V003-N00507.label: 寒实结胸证

V003-N00510.definition: 外感寒邪引起证候的统称。临床表现为恶寒重而发热轻，头身疼痛或肢体拘急，无汗，鼻塞流清涕，苔薄白而润，脉浮紧；或恶寒肢冷，胸、腹、腰、背冷痛而喜温，神静倦卧，咳喘痰白量多而易咯出，呕吐清涎，泄泻清稀或完谷不化，小便清长，面色苍白或青灰，舌淡紫苔白滑，脉弦紧或沉迟。

V003-N00510.definition: 寒邪侵袭机体，阳气被遏，以恶寒甚，无汗，头身或胸腹疼痛，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00514.definition: Characterized by severe aversion to cold, fever, absence of sweating, headache, and body aches. Alternatively, nasal obstruction, clear nasal discharge, and cough may be present. The tongue coating is thin and white. The pulse is superficial and tense. Often occurs when wind cold blocks the skin pores.

This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the liver meridian.

V003-N00524.definition: 因寒客胃脘，或饮食生冷，阴寒偏盛，胃失和降，或胃寒虫窜等所引起的一类证候。

V003-N00524.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00524.label: 胃实寒证
V003-N00524.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃寒证
V003-N00524.definition: 因寒邪客胃，或饮食生冷，阴寒凝胃，胃失和降所致。临床以胃脘冷痛，时作时止，甚则绞痛，呕吐清水，遇寒则甚，得热则舒，舌苔白，脉弦紧或迟缓等为特征的证候。

V003-N00524.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V003-N00524.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜脾系证类

V003-N00524.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00524.definition: Characterized by cold, intense stomach ache that alleviates upon warmth, vomiting of clear saliva, aversion to cold, and cold limbs. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when cold affects the descending of stomach qi.

V003-N00524.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V003-N00524.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00524.definition: 寒邪侵袭胃脘，胃失和降，以胃脘冷痛，痛势急剧，喜温，呕吐清水，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00524.label: 寒邪犯胃证

V003-N00524.definition: 寒邪侵袭胃脘，胃失和降，以胃脘冷痛、痛势急剧、喜温，呕吐清水，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00523.label: 寒滞胞宫证
V003-N00523.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V003-N00523.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜肾病证类

V003-N00523.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00523.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation that alleviates upon warmth. Dysmenorrhoea, delayed period with dark purple colour, white, thin and clear vaginal discharge and infertility may also be present. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is deep and tight. This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the uterus.

V003-N00523.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V003-N00523.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证｜寒凝证
V003-N00523.definition: 寒邪凝滞胞宫，以小腹冷痛，或痛经，喜温，或月经后期、色紫暗，或带下清稀色白，苔白，脉沉紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00525.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V003-N00525.definition: 寒邪侵袭胃肠，阻滞气机，以胃脘、腹部冷痛，痛势急剧、喜温，呕吐，腹泻清稀，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00529.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00529.label: 饮邪客肺证
V003-N00529.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰饮证｜水饮内停证
V003-N00529.definition: 因水饮内停，上迫于肺，肺失宣降所致。临床以胸闷、气急、喘咳，痰白量多，质地清稀，或咯泡沫痰，喉间哮鸣有声，甚则胁肋胀满，不得平卧，舌质暗淡，舌苔白滑，脉沉弦或滑，可伴见小便不利，眩晕，头身困重等为特征的证候。

V003-N00529.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00529.label: 寒饮伏肺证
V003-N00529.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00529.definition: Characterized by frequent, violent coughs with profuse, thin and white phlegm, rapid breathing and chest tightness. In severe cases, panting, an inability to lie flat, fever and aversion to cold may also be present. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is superficial and tense. This pattern often occurs when retained fluid combined with external cold affect the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V003-N00529.label: 寒饮停肺证
V003-N00529.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00529.definition: 寒饮停聚于肺，肺失肃降，以咳嗽气喘，或哮鸣有声，胸部紧闷，不能平卧，吐稀白痰诞，苔白清，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00529.label: 寒饮停肺证
V003-N00529.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证

V003-N01052.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒饮证｜寒饮内停证
V003-N01052.definition: 因外寒引动伏饮，或阴寒凝聚于肺系，肺失宣肃所致。临床以咳喘、哮鸣，形寒、畏冷，痰白清稀，四肢欠温，面色淡白，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑或腻，脉弦滑等为特征的证候。

V003-N00532.label: 痰饮停胃证
V003-N00532.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰饮证｜痰饮内停证
V003-N00532.definition: 因痰饮中阻，胃失和降所致。临床以胃脘痞闷，甚或胀痛，呕吐痰涎、清水，口淡、不饥，或口黏不爽，舌质淡，舌苔白腻或厚，脉弦滑，可伴见肢体沉重，胃有振水声等为特征的证候。

V003-N00532.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00532.label: 寒饮停胃证
V003-N00532.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00532.definition: Characterized by gastric masses/distension, splashing sounds in the stomach, and vomiting of thin, clear saliva. The tongue coating is white and slippery. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when cold fluids remain in the stomach.

V003-N00532.label: 寒饮停胃证
V003-N00532.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V003-N00532.definition: 寒性水饮停积于胃，以胃脘痞胀，胃中有振水声，呕吐清水稀涎，苔白滑，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V003-N01055.label: 寒饮停胃证
V003-N01055.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒饮证｜寒饮内停证
V003-N01055.definition: 因寒饮互结，停滞于胃，或胃寒饮聚所致。临床以胃脘痞胀，胃中有振水声，呕吐清水稀涎，舌苔白滑，脉弦，或伴见胃中寒痛，纳呆，呃逆，食入即吐等为特征的证候。

V003-N01055.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N01055.label: 寒饮停胃证
V003-N01055.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N01055.definition: Characterized by gastric masses/distension, splashing sounds in the stomach, and vomiting of thin, clear saliva. The tongue coating is white and slippery. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when cold fluids remain in the stomach.

V003-N01055.label: 寒饮停胃证
V003-N01055.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V003-N01055.definition: 寒性水饮停积于胃，以胃脘痞胀，胃中有振水声，呕吐清水稀涎，苔白滑，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00536.label: 忧伤神气证
V003-N00536.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V003-N00536.definition: 因忧虑过度，损伤神气所致。临床以情志抑郁，表情淡漠，不欲饮食，舌质淡暗，舌苔白，脉弦，伴见失眠、多梦，头晕，神疲等为特征的证候。

V003-N01499.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N01499.label: 忧郁伤神证
V003-N01499.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证
V003-N01499.definition: 因过度忧郁，损伤神气，或神不守舍所致。临床以情绪低落，神志恍惚，呵欠频作，独处不语，悲忧善哭，心悸，失眠，多梦、易醒，甚则彻夜不寐，哭笑无常，神情淡漠，疲乏、无力，舌质红，舌苔薄，脉弦细，可伴见心胸烦闷，注意力下降，甚或出现幻视、幻听，梦游、夜游等为特征的证候。

V003-N01499.label: 忧伤神气证
V003-N01499.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜脏腑证｜心系证类

V003-N01499.definition: Characterized by depression, apathetic facial expression, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, lassitude, and a poor appetite. The pulse is wiry. Often occurs when excessive worry damages the mind.

V003-N00538.definition: Characterized by worries, suspiciousness, dizziness, lassitude, palpitations, timidity, insomnia, forgetfulness, a poor appetite, and a lustreless complexion. The tongue is pale with a thin, white coating. The pulse is thready. This pattern often results from qi stagnation due to thinking too much, mental over-exertion or emotional disturbance.

V003-N00538.label: 思伤脾气证
V003-N00538.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V003-N00538.definition: 思虑太过，脾气郁滞，以神情呆滞，不思饮食，胸胁脘腹作胀，喜叹息，大便不爽，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00545.definition: Characterized by panic, impotence, nocturnal emissions, timidity, paranoia, and bladder/bowel incontinence. Often occurs when severe fear or fright damages kidney qi.

V003-N00545.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候

V003-N00551.label: 暑湿证
V003-N00551.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00551.definition: Characterized by alternating chills and fever, inhibited sweating, limb heaviness, thirst, restlessness, dusty complexion, chest tightness, nausea, vomiting, loose stools with a sensation of incomplete evacuation, and scanty, hesitant urination. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when summer heat and dampness or pestilence enter and remain in the body.

V003-N00556.definition: Characterized by abdominal discomfort, poor appetite, a sticky, greasy taste in the mouth, thirst with little water intake, limb soreness/heaviness/pain, dizziness and headache with a distending sensation. Alternatively, waves of fever in the afternoon, limb oedema, loose stools, and scanty urine may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when summer heat and dampness obstruct the qi activities of the spleen and stomach.

V003-N00564.label: 暑热内郁证
V003-N00564.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜暑证类｜暑热证｜暑入气分证
V003-N00564.definition: 因暑热或疟毒内伏，邪阻气分所致。临床以发热，汗出不畅，头晕胀痛，面目红赤，气粗，或寒战、壮热，热多寒少，汗后热退，休作有时，舌质红，舌苔黄燥，脉洪大或弦数，指纹紫滞，可伴见心烦，骨节酸楚，口渴引饮等为特征的证候。

V003-N00564.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00564.label: 暑热证
V003-N00564.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00564.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, dizziness, sweating, lassitude, chest tightness, and scanty, yellow urine. The tongue is red with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. Often occurs when summer heat or pestilence attacks the body to cause a severe struggle between anti-pathogenic qi and pathogenic factors or a depletion of qi and fluids.

V003-N00564.label: 暑温
V003-N00564.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V003-N00564.definition: 病名。炎暑季令之温热病，症情一般较重。暑多挟湿，暑温系指暑热偏盛者。《湿病条辨·上焦篇》：“暑温者，正夏之时，暑病之偏于热者也。”余奉仙谓：“暑温者，即夏时之热病也。暑字之义，乃日者两字相合而成。日者，阳之精;暑者，热之极。”(见《医方经验汇编》)，症见壮热口渴，心烦面赤，汗多少气，脉多洪大。如不予及时施治，可致邪陷心营、引动肝风，出现高热神昏、嗜睡、肢体抽瘛、角弓反张、或身发斑疹，初起宜以白虎汤原方或加减方，以清气分邪热而保津。神情躁烦、意识不清或神昏谵语、肢体痉强、舌苔黄、舌质红绛或无苔者，宜以犀角地黄汤、清瘟败毒饮、紫雪散、至宝丹等方酌情选用，若津气两虚，宜用白虎人参汤、清暑益气汤等以益气生津。暑温挟湿则兼见胸闷恶心，小便短赤，大便溏泄等症，当兼用芳香化浊、利湿之剂。如见高热、头痛、呕吐、嗜睡、昏迷、抽搐诸症，亦称暑痫。参见温病、湿温、暑痫等条。

V003-N00575.label: 暑入心包证
V003-N00575.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜暑证类｜暑热证｜暑入营血证
V003-N00575.definition: 因感染暑热时邪或疫毒，邪热炽盛，逆传心包所致。临床以壮热不已，心烦，迅即神志昏蒙，时或谵语，甚则躁狂不宁，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉滑疾或数，指纹色紫，达于气关或命关，伴见口渴，呼吸气粗，小便短赤等为特征的证候。

V003-N00575.label: 暑热闭神证
V003-N00575.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜病因证候｜外感证｜暑证
V003-N00575.definition: 暑热炽盛，内闭心神，以壮热烦渴，突然昏倒，神志不清，四肢厥逆，呼吸气粗，牙关紧闭，脉沉伏等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00579.definition: Characterized by persistent high fever, unconsciousness, mania, delirium, and convulsions of the limbs. Alternatively, opisthotonus and trismus may be present. Often occurs when summer heat/dampness or pestilence stir the liver wind.

V003-N00597.definition: 泛指正气亏虚，正不胜邪而至毒邪内陷，以神昏、谵语、动风、动血、气息微弱、二便失禁等为常见症的危重证侯。

V003-N00598.label: 邪毒内扰证
V003-N00598.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜毒邪证

V003-N00598.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00598.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, maculae, unconsciousness, delirium, a dry mouth, thirst and constipation. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when toxic fire/heat enters the Ying nutrients and blood phases.

V003-N00598.label: 邪毒炽盛证
V003-N00598.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜病因证候｜毒证
V003-N00598.definition: 泛指各种邪毒壅盛所致证候，其症因毒邪的不同而各具特征。

V003-N00599.label: 毒侵肺卫证

V003-N00599.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00599.definition: Characterized by fever, headache, mild aversion to wind cold, mild/no sweating, cough, mild thirst and sore throat. The tongue coating is thin white or yellow. The pulse is floating and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm heat attacks the Wei-defence and affects the dispersing of lung qi.

V003-N00600.label: 毒入营血证
V003-N00600.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜毒邪证｜邪毒内扰证

V003-N00600.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00600.definition: Characterized by a high fever, excessive thirst, unconsciousness, delirium and dark purple maculae or bleeding of dark red blood. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is rapid. Often occurs when toxic fire/heat enters the Ying nutrients and blood.

V003-N00617.definition: 因湿毒蕴结，带脉失约所致。临床以带下黏稠、量多，黄绿成脓，或浑浊如泔，臭秽难闻，小腹或腰骶部胀痛，舌质淡红，舌苔垢腻或黄，脉滑数，可伴见外阴瘙痒，甚或痒痛难忍，口苦、咽干等为特征的证候。

V003-N00617.definition: Characterized by chronic, progressive development of ulcerative oozing that is difficult to heal. Often occurs when long-term dampness transforms into toxins.

V003-N00624.label: 火毒炽盛证
V003-N00624.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火热邪毒壅盛证
V003-N00624.definition: 因火热邪毒炽盛，壅滞肌腠，腐败气血所致。临床以疮疖疔痈脓头泛发，向四周浸润，剧痛，皮肤红斑或大疱等糜烂、化脓，口腔溃疡，阴疮，肛周脓疡，或黄疸迅速加深，下利脓血，或月经淋漓、崩漏，带下色黄，气味臭秽，舌质红绛，舌苔黄燥或焦褐，脉洪数或弦数、滑数有力，可伴见高热、烦渴，面红，口气臭秽等为特征的证候。

V003-N00624.definition: Characterized by red, swollen, ulcerative and painful skin boils with a burning sensation, fever, and thirst. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. Often occurs when fire heat transforms into toxins.

V003-N00669.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00669.label: 火毒证
V003-N00669.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类
V003-N00669.definition: 泛指因火热温毒侵袭体表，或蕴蓄肌腠，上攻官窍，流窜经络，内传脏腑，或邪入营血，损伤阴津，闭脱内陷等所引起的一类证候。注：病情轻、初起者为热毒证；病情重、病久者为火毒证；具有传染性者为温毒证。

V003-N00669.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00669.label: 热毒壅结证
V003-N00669.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火热邪毒壅盛证
V003-N00669.definition: 因虫螫叮咬，或曝晒日毒，嗜食辛辣肥甘等，热毒蕴结于肤腠所致。临床以局部突然红肿、灼痛，光软无头，或赤肿高突，根脚紧束，或触及结块，表面灼热、触痛，周围焮红，持续加剧，或成片皮疹、水疱，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数或弦滑，可伴见发热、恶寒，头痛、泛恶，口渴，臖核肿大，肛门灼痛等为特征的证候。

V003-N00669.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00669.label: 热毒炽盛证
V003-N00669.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火热邪毒壅盛证
V003-N00669.definition: 因热毒壅滞肌肤，或温热入里，壅滞化毒，蕴结脏腑三焦所致。临床以高热，烦渴，面红，口臭，大便燥结，小便短赤，舌质红绛，舌苔黄燥或焦黄，脉弦数或滑，伴见皮肤红斑、紫斑密布，疹色红赤或紫暗，或腹痛挛急，腹中包块，或黄疸加深，大便脓血，或月经淋漓、崩下，肛门肿痛等为特征的证候。

V003-N00630.definition: 邪毒外袭，火毒上攻耳窍，以耳部剧痛，鼓膜充血或穿孔流脓，或外耳道生疮疖，舌红苔黄，脉数有力等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00631.definition: 火热毒邪侵袭鼻窍，以外鼻及鼻前庭红肿疼痛，或生疔疖、溃烂，或鼻衄量多势剧，发热口渴，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00632.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜头面官窍证候｜实邪犯头证
V003-N00632.definition: 火热疫毒壅结头面部及其官窍，以头面红肿灼热，或颜面生疔疖，烦热口渴，便结尿黄，舌红脉数，甚则壮热、谵语、神昏等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00634.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒伤阴证

V003-N00634.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00634.label: 热毒伤阴证
V003-N00634.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒伤阴证
V003-N00634.definition: 因火热邪毒损伤阴津所致。临床以午后潮热，汗出热退，皮肤干燥或干瘪，口渴引饮，恶心、呕吐，舌瘦红绛，舌苔黄燥，脉细弦数，或伴见腹胀，腹痛弥漫，全腹挛急，触及包块，肌肉萎缩，指趾干性坏疽等征象为特征的证候。

V003-N00634.label: 热毒伤阴证
V003-N00634.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证｜实热证
V003-N00634.definition: 火热毒邪壅盛，耗伤阴液，以壮热口渴，烦躁不宁，面赤唇焦，少汗或无汗，便结尿黄，舌红绛而干，苔黄少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00635.label: 火毒伤阴证
V003-N00635.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证

V003-N00635.label: 热毒伤阴证
V003-N00635.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒伤阴证

V003-N00635.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00635.label: 火毒伤阴证
V003-N00635.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证
V003-N00635.definition: 因火热毒邪壅盛，耗损阴津所致。临床以潮热、盗汗，消瘦，皮肤干瘪，小便短少，舌质红，舌苔少或无苔，脉细数，伴见邪毒炽盛或蕴结等征象为特征的证候。

V003-N00635.label: 热毒伤阴证
V003-N00635.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证｜实热证
V003-N00635.definition: 火热毒邪壅盛，耗伤阴液，以壮热口渴，烦躁不宁，面赤唇焦，少汗或无汗，便结尿黄，舌红绛而干，苔黄少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00637.label: 热入营血证
V003-N00637.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证

V003-N00637.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V003-N00637.label: 热入营血证
V003-N00637.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V003-N00637.definition: 因温热邪毒炽盛，邪入或内陷营血所致。临床以身热夜甚，心烦、不寐，咽干、唇燥，烦躁，神昏、谵语，舌质绛，舌苔少或无苔，脉细数，指纹紫黑，可伴见斑疹紫红或黑，咳血或呕血、衄血、尿血等为特征的证候。

V003-N00637.label: 热入营血证
V003-N00637.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜卫气营血证｜营分证

V003-N00637.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00637.label: 热入营血证
V003-N00637.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00637.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness and insomnia. Alternatively, unconsciousness, thirst with little water intake, maculae, bleeding, constipation and yellow urine may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm/heat consumes yin blood and disturbs the heart mind.

V003-N00637.definition: 火热壅盛成毒，以肌肤等外生疮疖疔痈、红肿灼痛、化脓溃烂、发热口渴、舌红苔黄、脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00637.label: 热入营血证

V003-N00637.definition: 温热病邪深入营血分，伤耗阴血，扰乱心神，以身热夜甚，心烦不寐，或神昏，渴不多饮，斑疹隐隐，或出血，便结尿黄，舌绛，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00854.definition: 因火毒炽盛，热入营血所致。临床以壮热、烦渴，目赤肿痛，神昏、谵语，或衄血，血色暗红，或全身泛发红斑、疱疹、糜烂、溃脓、结痂，或口腔、阴部等局部溃疡、糜烂，舌质红绛，舌苔黄，脉滑数，可伴见恶心、呕吐，关节疼痛，大便秘结，小便黄赤等为特征的证候。

V003-N00649.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00649.label: 热毒闭肺证
V003-N00649.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00649.definition: 热毒炽盛，阻闭肺气，以发热肢厥，口渴，咳嗽，气粗而喘，胸闷，鼻煽气灼，舌红苔黄，脉见症的证候。

V003-N00649.label: 热毒闭肺证
V003-N00649.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V003-N00649.definition: 火热毒邪炽盛，阻闭肺气。以发热肢厥，口渴，咳嗽，气粗而喘，胸部紧闷，鼻煽气灼，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00649.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00649.label: 热毒闭肺证
V003-N00649.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜脏腑辨证类
V003-N00649.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever, reversal cold of limbs, cough, dyspnea, a feeling of pressure in the chest with coarse breath, reddened tongue with yellow coating and rapid sunken pulse

V003-N00650.label: 火热毒邪淤肝证
V003-N00650.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证｜火毒内闭证

V003-N00650.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00650.label: 热毒淤肝证
V003-N00650.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00650.definition: Characterized by burning pain or masses in the subcostal region, a high-grade fever, thirst, yellowish skin and eyes, and a red face. In severe cases, mental unconsciousness may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when toxic fire/heat remains in the liver.

V003-N00650.label: 热毒淤肝证
V003-N00650.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V003-N00650.definition: 火热毒邪，淤滞于肝，以胁胀灼痛，或胁下有肿块，壮热，口渴，身目深黄，甚或神昏，面赤，舌红苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00651.label: 火毒内陷证
V003-N00651.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证

V003-N00651.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V003-N00651.label: 热毒内陷证
V003-N00651.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V003-N00651.definition: Characterized by a high-grade fever, thirst, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark red complexion, constipation and yellow urine. The tongue is dark red with a yellow coating. The pulse is deep and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire/heat toxins enters the zang–fu organs.

V003-N00651.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V003-N00651.label: 火毒内陷证
V003-N00651.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V003-N00651.label: 热毒内陷证
V003-N00651.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V003-N00651.definition: 火热毒邪炽盛，内陷脏腑，以壮热口渴，神昏谵语，面色暗红，便秘尿黄，舌红绛，苔黄，脉沉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00651.label: 热毒内陷证
V003-N00651.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证｜实热证
V003-N00651.definition: 火热毒邪炽盛，内陷脏腑，以壮热口渴，神昏谵语，面色暗红，便秘尿黄，舌红绛，苔黄，脉沉数等为常见症的证候。

V003-N00651.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V003-N00651.label: 火毒内陷证
V003-N00651.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜病因辨证类
V003-N00651.definition: a syndrome arising when exuberant fire-heat toxin penetrates into the internal organs, usually manifested by high fever with thirst, delirium, constipation, darkcolored urine, crimson tongue with yellow coating and rapid sunken pulse

V003-N00652.label: 干陷证
V003-N00652.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证｜火毒内陷证

V003-N00654.label: 虚陷证
